title: Vanilla Adventures +
description: This is a modpack based off of Flowstates Better Adventures + with some tweaks and additions to fit my tastes of the game!
body:
The inital purpose of this modpack was to add onto [**Flowstates Better Adventures +**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/better-adventures-plus) and make it so my friends could easliy use it. This however quickly changed into its own project I took interest in to see what modpacks where all about which in-turn made this into its own seperate project that focused on Gameplay, Visual, and Interactable improvments to the game all while teaching me how to create modpacks. 

_However all things must come to an end and this modpack will no longer be updated **(Except for game breaking bugs)** and I will continue this journey with my other modpacks listed below, thank you for your support on this modpack!_
#
### My Other Modpacks:
- [**Vanilla Journeys +**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla-journeys-plus) - _The sucessor to this modpack_
- [**Lost Horizons**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/lost-horizons) - _A modpack with the focus of giving the player as much customization as possible._
#

### Copyrights
- Nullscape: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nullscape](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nullscape)
- Super Better Grass: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/super-better-grass](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/super-better-grass)
- Vanilla Tweaks: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vanillatweaks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vanillatweaks)
